records.name: chrome debt
records.summary: Installments owed on implants that can be remotely throttled if unpaid.

records.name: fog-eyed
records.summary: Still half-lost in braindance bleed or bad neural spillover.

records.name: glass luck
records.summary: A lucky break so fragile everyone expects it to shatter.

records.name: saint patch
records.summary: An improvised community repair job done with love and terrible tools.

records.name: red weather
records.summary: Conditions so tense that everyone is armed before the rain starts.

records.name: corp clean
records.summary: So sanitized it is obviously hiding a body somewhere nearby.

records.name: wire prayer
records.summary: A desperate hack performed with equal parts skill and superstition.

records.name: ghost tax
records.summary: The extra cost paid whenever anonymity must be bought back.

records.name: lane burned
records.summary: A route, contact, or trick that can never be used safely again.

records.name: velvet violence
records.summary: The kind of harm delivered with smiles, NDAs, and perfect lighting.
